Module Images

Photographic backgrounds used across application modules and landing screens.

Background 0
Background 1
Background 2
Background 3
Background 4

Guidelines

Use SVG for illustrations SVG format is scalable, lightweight, and theme-compatible. Prefer SVG for all illustrations and icons.
Respect aspect ratios Never stretch or distort images. Use object-fit: contain for illustrations and object-fit: cover for backgrounds.
Lazy-load below-the-fold images Add loading="lazy" on any image not visible on initial page load to reduce network overhead.
Provide descriptive alt text Every image must have a meaningful alt attribute. Use an empty alt="" only for purely decorative images.
Optimize for web delivery Compress JPEGs and PNGs before use. Prefer modern formats (.webp) with fallbacks for compatibility.
On this page
